English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell Outing Club records
Cornell Outing Club
37-6-3416
5.3 cubic feet. 5.3 cubic feet.
1941-2012. Financial documents, photographs, printed materials, publications Documentation of all Outing Club activities between 1930 and 2012, and maps of the surrounding areas. Meeting minutes, financial statements, membership lists, and other items documenting the clubs activities are included. Collection material in English 5417861
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Julia McDowell
Date completed:
February 2013
EAD encoding:
Julia McDowell, February 2013
Date modified:
RMC Staff, November 2014
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
In the 1950s college outing clubs in the northeast associated in the Intercollegiate Outing Clubs Association (IOCA) which sponsored numerous events. In 1952 a Finger Lakes Regional IOCA was established for local colleges and universities.The Cornell Outing Club has been an active part of Cornell life since the 1920s.
Cite As:
Cornell Outing Club records, #37-6-3416. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content
Newsletters from the Cornell Outing Club and the Finger Lakes Regional club; "The Outing Club Handbook"; and photographs, with some identification, from the Cornell Outing Club and the Intercollegiate Outing Club Annual Conference in 1952, collected by Hugh E. Kingery '54. This collection includes photos, trip history, budget history, and newsletters. Documentation of all Outing Club activities between 1930 and 2012, and maps of the surrounding areas. Meeting minutes, financial statements, membership lists, and other items documenting the clubs activities are included. Many photographs of events on Beebe Lake and on trips are included, camping, caving, ice climbing, Japes Lodge, etc.. Intercollegiate Outing Club Association (IOCA) 1941 3rd Annual Song Fest book.
Kingery, Hugh E. Intercollegiate Outing Clubs Association Finger Lakes Regional Intercollegiate Outing Clubs Association

Scope and Contents
Owned by Bill Sumner, Algonquin Lodge.Mary Alice Dietrich Scrapbook61COC Scrapbook62IOCR ConferenceApril 195463Undated Photos64
Scope and Contents
Includes photos of Beebe Lake, including winter carnivalMiscellaneous Photos1940s-2000s65-9
Scope and Contents
Photos some labeled and some not, include images from trips and members over several decades. Trips include camping, caving, activities on Beebe Lake, and others.Slides and "album pages" created from slide scans1952-1953537Conference photographs1952, 1954536Outing Club programs1952-1953535Cornell Outing Club patch2019-05-28535Intercollegiate Outing Clubs Association (IOCA) alum patch1952-1953535Cornell Outing Club webcrawl
